mapper.insert: insert into zs_tp_order ( id, third_party_pk, customer, sheet_je, dh, supno, sup, supno2, sup2, ckno, ck, pc, oper, bz, jsfs, receive_channel, scm_sup_code, ksbh, ksmc, zjly, create_by, create_time, del_flag ) values ( #{id}, #{thirdPartyPk}, #{customer}, #{sheetJe}, #{dh}, #{supno}, #{sup}, #{supno2}, #{sup2}, #{ckno}, #{ck}, #{pc}, #{oper}, #{bz}, #{jsfs}, #{receiveChannel}, #{scmSupCode}, #{ksbh}, #{ksmc}, #{zjly}, #{createBy}, now(), '0' )

insert into zs_tp_order_detail ( id, order_id, third_party_pk, dh, code, name, gg, dw, bzl, sccj, zcz, phflag, sl, dj, je, jm, cgj, bz, bz1, bz2, dsb, create_time, del_flag ) values ( #{id}, #{orderId}, #{thirdPartyPk}, #{dh}, #{code}, #{name}, #{gg}, #{dw}, #{bzl}, #{sccj}, #{zcz}, #{phflag}, #{sl}, #{dj}, #{je}, #{jm}, #{cgj}, #{bz}, #{bz1}, #{bz2}, #{dsb}, now(), '0' )
mapper.update: update zs_tp_order set del_flag = '1', del_by = #{delBy}, del_time = now() where id = #{id} and del_flag = '0'
update zs_tp_order_detail set del_flag = '1', del_by = #{delBy}, del_time = now() where order_id = #{orderId} and del_flag = '0'
